content: Hi, I'm Devon, nice to meet you. I've been working as an AI ethics researcher at a think tank in New York City for about 5 years now.
Nice to meet you too, Devon! AI ethics is a fascinating field, what drew you to it?

I've always been interested in the intersection of technology and society, and I think AI has the potential to greatly impact our lives. I've also been trying to find ways to manage my chronic back pain, it's been a challenge.
I'm so sorry to hear that you're dealing with chronic back pain, Devon. Have you tried any alternative therapies like acupuncture or physical therapy?
Yes, I've tried a few things, but I'm still looking for the right combination. I've also been trying to get into urban sketching, I find it really helps me relax.
Urban sketching is a great hobby, it's a wonderful way to observe and appreciate the world around you. What kind of subjects do you like to sketch?

I like to sketch buildings and cityscapes, there's something about the architecture and the energy of the city that I find really inspiring. I've also been trying to get into marathon running, I've got a goal to run the Boston Marathon next year.
That's amazing, Devon! Marathon running is a huge commitment, but it's great that you're pushing yourself to reach your goal. Have you started training yet?
Yes, I've started training, but it's been tough with my back pain. I'm trying to find ways to modify my training to accommodate my injury.
It's great that you're being mindful of your body and taking steps to modify your training. Have you considered working with a physical therapist or a running coach to help you develop a plan?
Actually, I've been working with a physical therapist, and it's been really helpful. I've also been trying to get into hiking, I love being outdoors and exploring new trails.
Hiking is a great way to get exercise and enjoy nature, Devon. What's your favorite hiking spot so far?
I've been hiking in the Hudson Valley, it's beautiful up there. I've also been trying to learn more about the local flora and fauna, it's really fascinating.

The Hudson Valley is a great place to hike, and learning about the local flora and fauna can add a whole new level of depth to your hikes. Have you thought about joining a hiking group or finding a hiking buddy?

Actually, I've been thinking about joining a hiking group, it would be great to meet other people who share my interests. Maybe I'll even start a blog to document my hikes and share my experiences with others.
A blog would be a great way to share your experiences and connect with other hikers, Devon. You could even include some of your urban sketches and write about the intersection of art and nature.
